content.en:
Taiwu Territory.

After all these years of healing, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor finally recovered from his injuries.

At this time, he took out an incomparably large insect egg, and then took out a piece of real dragon beard vine.

"With this piece of True Dragon Sue Vine, I can cultivate this True Dragon Worm Mother!"

Wutong Heavenly Ancestor muttered.

For the sake of this true dragon worm mother, he almost fell, and later for this piece of true dragon suke, he found two heavenly ancestors to help and seize the true dragon suji vine together.

As a result, this matter was almost destroyed by the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, if there is no true dragon sukeen, it can be cultivated with other materials, but other materials are also rarer, or the real dragon suji vine is a little hopeful.

It was precisely because the True Dragon Sudo was too important to him that he would fight with the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

As he integrated this piece of True Dragon Suke into the eggs of the True Dragon Worm little by little, he prepared a large amount of resources for the eggs of the True Dragon Worm to absorb energy.

This process must be done with care and care, and there must be no mistakes.

After his long years of careful cultivation, he finally cultivated the True Dragon Worm Mother.

Rumble!!!!

An aura that was comparable to the invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor diffused from the True Dragon Worm Mother.

"It is worthy of being a true dragon insect mother, just cultivated is enough to rival the invincible level fifth stage ancestor, as long as there are enough living beings, the true dragon insect mother can grow to the boundary-breaking level. "

The purpose of the Wutong Heavenly Ancestor was naturally not to just cultivate a True Dragon Worm Mother comparable to the Boundary Breaking Level, but to cultivate a Heavenly Ancestor-level True Dragon Worm Mother.

A Heavenly Ancestor-level True Dragon Insect Mother can easily devour an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor, and its strength has reached an incomparably terrifying level, which is definitely no less than the current Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

If he could control such a true dragon worm mother, how powerful should he be, and did he still need to be afraid of a strong person like Dongao Heavenly Ancestor?

As for an existence like the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor, he could destroy it with a wave of his hand!

Moreover, mastering a Heavenly Ancestor-level True Dragon Worm Mother is equivalent to mastering an army of True Dragon Worms!

For example, the Boundary-Breaking True Dragon Worm Mother can cultivate ten invincible-level fifth-stage, thousands of peak fifth-stage, and countless ordinary fifth-stage true dragon worm clans.

If it is a Heavenly Ancestor-level True Dragon Worm Mother, it can cultivate ten Boundary-Breaking True Dragon Worms, as well as thousands of Invincible-level Fifth-Stage True Dragon Worms, as well as a massive number of Peak Fifth-Stage True Dragon Worms.

It is conceivable that with such an army, he is enough to annihilate those top powers.

Moreover, the true dragon insect has been killed, and it can continue to be cultivated, which is equivalent to having a steady army.

Because of this, he dreamed of getting a true dragon worm mother, and now he finally got it.

"You have to be careful, if those Heavenly Ancestors knew that I had a True Dragon Worm Mother, they would definitely want to kill me!"

Because the mother of the true dragon insect wants to grow, she has to rely on the feedback of the real dragon worm.

The True Dragon Worm Mother needs to first give birth to a batch of True Dragon Worms, and these True Dragon Worms devour creatures and continue to grow, feeding back to the True Dragon Worm Mother, making the True Dragon Worm Mother stronger and stronger!

And the more creatures devoured, the better, the more powerful the better, and it is better to devour immeasurable lifeforms.

Therefore, wherever the true dragon worm passes, even a realm will become a dead silence.

If you want to cultivate a true dragon insect mother to the Heavenly Ancestor level, just one realm is not enough, you need many realms of beings and countless immeasurable lifeforms.

Those top forces will definitely not want to see this situation, and will definitely take action to destroy him.

"I have the True Dragon Sushien, when the time comes, those Heavenly Ancestors will definitely look for me, I must hide it first, and then let the True Dragon Worm Mother cultivate the first batch of True Dragon Worms!"

With this plan, Wutong Heavenly Ancestor began to prepare, and disguised that he needed to go to a dangerous place and would not come back for a long time.

Although this may not be useful, at least you can expose yourself a little later.

Later, he came to a secret place and began to let the True Dragon Worm Mother give birth to the True Dragon Worm.

In a short period of time, tens of thousands of true dragon insects were cultivated.

These true dragon insects have not yet reached the fifth stage, and they are all existences at the peak of the fourth stage.

It's not that it can't cultivate a fifth-stage Great Ancestor level true dragon worm, it's just that it's not necessary, and it will consume the power of the true dragon worm mother.

It hasn't been long since the True Dragon Worm Mother was cultivated, so it's better to be safe and cultivate a batch of True Dragon Worms at the peak of the fourth stage.

Subsequently, he began to release these true dragon worms.

Of course, he didn't let these true dragon insects go to those powerful realms, that was to find death, and a Heavenly Ancestor could destroy all the true dragon insects in an instant.

He was going to enter these true dragon worms into those weaker immeasurable realms, those immeasurable realms were the realms below the realm realm, the number of strong ones was scarce, but the number of living beings was quite large.

An immeasurable realm is enough to feed back a lot of energy from the True Dragon Worm Mother, and it is the most suitable target at present.

......

Jin Xuanjie.

This is a realm similar to the Silent Black Sea, with countless living beings, many cultivators, and hundreds of immeasurable lifeforms.

this day.

A batch of True Dragon Worms entered the Jin Xuan Realm, and each True Dragon Worm easily devoured the creatures of one territory after another, and the speed of devouring was very fast.

"What is this?"

When a primary-level immeasurable lifeform saw the True Dragon Insect, he was shocked by the breath of the True Dragon Insect, unable to move, and was immediately swallowed and digested by it.

Not to mention the beginner level, even the middle level or even the general high-level immeasurable lifeforms face the real dragon insects, they are all ant-like existences, and there is no way to compete with them.

It didn't take long for the Jin Xuan Realm to turn into a lifeless realm, and there was not a single living being.

In this way, as time passed, many of the immeasurable realms became dead and silent, and all living beings were gone.

Since no Heavenly Ancestor would probe the Infinite Realm, and there were almost no Fifth Stage Great Ancestors in the Infinite Realm, this news was not passed on at all.

If the news of the True Dragon Worm devouring the creatures of the Infinite Realm is to be exposed, it will take at least a long time.

Silent Black Sea.

A replica body of Ye Tian was cutting off the Heavenly Tower to cultivate.

Today's Silent Black Sea is much more powerful than before, there are already many primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, and even the human race has given birth to many primary-level immeasurable lifeforms.

And there are also many middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, and even under Ye Tian's cultivation, several high-level immeasurable lifeforms were born.

It can be said that the strength of the Silent Black Sea is many times stronger than in the past.

Normally, the Silent Black Sea is very calm, and there are hardly any major events.

But suddenly, a group of true dragon insects appeared here, and in an instant, they devoured the creatures of a large regional realm, and their speed was so fast that even the forces of the Nine Pillars had not expected.

At the first time, they asked Ye Tian for help, because this matter was not something they could handle at all.

Any true dragon worm can destroy them countless times, how can they have the strength to resist!
